sql_array: CREATE TABLE publications (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), log_file VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO publications (name, log_file) VALUES ('demo-publication', NULL);
SELECT * FROM publications WHERE NOT (name IS NULL) AND NOT (log_file IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE log_files (file_name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT REPL_NEW_LOG((SELECT name FROM publications WHERE id = 1), (SELECT file_name FROM log_files WHERE created_at < NOW()));
SELECT * FROM publications WHERE NOT (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM log_files WHERE log_file = 'non_existent.log')) AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM log_files) > 0;
SELECT REPL_NEW_LOG(name, CASE WHEN log_file IS NULL THEN 'new_log_file_name.log' ELSE log_file END) FROM publications;
SELECT DISTINCT log_file FROM publications WHERE NOT (log_file LIKE '%.log') AND name NOT IN (SELECT name FROM publications WHERE log_file IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY log_file HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1;

WITH recent_logs AS (SELECT file_name, created_at FROM log_files WHERE NOT (created_at < '2023-01-01') ORDER BY created_at DESC) SELECT REPL_NEW_LOG('demo-publication', (SELECT file_name FROM recent_logs LIMIT 1));
